---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, DSP algorithm enhancement, or new board support
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm frustrated when trying to track..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Detail any mathematical algorithms or hardware controls you'd like to integrate.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, drawings, block diagrams, or mathematical formulations about the feature request here.
